description_long: This chest of drawers features a boxy, utilitarian design with a muted, dark green finish that gives it a weathered, industrial appearance. The front face is equipped with two small upper drawers and two larger lower doors, each fitted with simple round knob handles. The surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing objects, while the sides and back are plain and unadorned, emphasizing function over form. The legs are short and slightly inset, providing stability without drawing attention. The finish appears matte and slightly rough, suggesting it is made from painted or coated wood or metal, possibly intended for use in garages, workshops, or outdoor urban environments. There are no visible decorative features, branding, or locks, reinforcing its practical, no-nonsense character.
description: A sturdy, dark green chest of drawers with a matte, weathered finish and simple round knob handles. Its utilitarian design features two upper drawers and two lower doors, suitable for functional urban settings.
description_view_0: The left side of the chest is visible, showing a plain, flat surface with a slightly rough, matte green finish and no visible handles or features.
description_view_1: The front view displays two small upper drawers and two larger lower doors, each with round knob handles, highlighting the main interactive features.
description_view_2: The right side is shown, mirroring the left with a plain, unadorned surface and the same matte green texture.
description_view_3: The back view reveals a featureless, flat panel with the same green finish, lacking any handles or openings.
